headline: Simon Amends $5B Credit Facility: What It Signals for Growth Plans
summary: SPG amends and extends a $5B revolving credit facility to 2030 at lower rates, aligning another $3.5B line and boosting flexibility for redevelopment.

raw.headline: Simon Amends $5B Credit Facility: What It Signals for Growth Plans

headline: Occupancy Strength at Realty Income: Will the Stability Last?
summary: O maintains 98.9% occupancy across 15,000+ properties, with high tenant retention and rising rent recapture rates.
